creator: rafi@guengel.ch
text:
Created attachment 190745
Patch to update port to upstream release 1.1 and maintain port hygiene.

Update YAPET to latest upstream release 1.1. Compiles with clang 6.0 on FreeBSD.

Ports updates:
---

* Updated master site in ports Makefile.
* Fixed issues reported by `make check-orphans`.
* Updated the URL to the official WWW homepage in `pkg-descr`.
